problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity may resolve What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? by blocking at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
